message:
test: Add validate_pack helper and new regression tests

Add comprehensive pack validation helper and new regression tests for
edge cases in command evaluation.

**New Test Helper: validate_pack() (src/packs/test_helpers.rs)**

Consolidate common pack validation checks into a single helper function.
This reduces boilerplate in pack tests and ensures consistent validation:

- ID format validation (lowercase, dots/underscores/digits only)
- Required fields check (name, description, keywords non-empty)
- Pattern compilation verification
- Pattern reason strings present
- Unique pattern names

Usage:
```rust
use crate::packs::test_helpers::validate_pack;

#[test]
fn test_my_pack() {
    let pack = create_pack();
    validate_pack(&pack); // Comprehensive structural validation
}
```

**New Regression Tests:**

1. tests/repro_echo_fp.rs - Echo False Positive
   Verifies that "echo rm -rf /" is correctly ALLOWED.
   The echo command prints text, it doesn't execute it.
   This tests the SafeStringRegistry's is_all_args_data() handling.

2. tests/repro_wrapper_bypass.rs - Wrapper Command Bypass
   Verifies that wrapper commands don't bypass detection:
   - "nice rm -rf /"
   - "time rm -rf /"
   - "nohup rm -rf /"
   - "watch rm -rf /"
   - "timeout 10s rm -rf /"
   All must be correctly DENIED despite the wrapper prefix.

3. tests/repro_line_continuation_bypass.rs - Line Continuation
   Verifies that backslash line continuations don't break detection:
   - "rm \\\n-rf /"
   Must be correctly DENIED even with the continuation.

These tests document known edge cases and prevent regressions in
the context classification and command normalization logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
